results.title: ‎Memo Notepad App - App Store
results.content:
## Ratings & Reviews

 4.5

  out of 5

  23 Ratings

 ### Best Ever

  Oregongrammy

  I have tried nearly every reminder in tha app dept and nothing worked for me until now. I don’t need a memo for the office. I don’t need to schedule family activities. I need to manage myself! I’m a senior citizen and need to keep track of my daily events. This is perfect. It provides plenty of opportunities for scheduling activities. It’s easy to keep a record of weekly obligations. I can’t think of anything that would improve it.
 ### Memo Notepad Is Wonderul

  Skyveterans [...] The simple and easy place for your quick thoughts Memo Notepad provides you with a totally simple way to take notes on your iPhone. Saving, cloud syncing all happens in the background. Just focus and write down what you are thinking super quickly and easily. Memo is a perfect place for your thoughts, email drafts, journals, lists, or study and meeting notes. Beyond the simplicity of standard note taking, Memo gives you the power to organize your notes into individual notepads or to set reminders if you want to come back to a note later. If you want to share your notes with your friends, you can easily send them a copy over email. You can even add a contact from your Address Book to a note to let them view and edit a note. Sharing a lot of notes? You can share an entire notebook of notes, [...] Skyveterans

  I've only been using it a couple days and being a web developer. This is buy far one of those elsential apps everyone needs. It looks and works great. Very easy to use and helps my work load along with collaborating with others.
 ### Forgot password

  memonotepad lover

  Hello, I forgot password for this app and it says check your inbox but I never get email. Can you please help me, I have important stuffs in that app. I want to get back to that app, it is possible to send me reset your password email please.. thank you 👏👏👏👏
 ### Easiest way to share notes with team

  amy quimby

  There is not an easier way to write and share notes

fix support for ios 26

Version 0.15.18

results.title: How to write a memo in 5 steps | Adobe Acrobat for business
results.content:
Background or feedback about the situation  
   Supporting details about the problem (how the problem was discovered, additional evidence, etc)  
   Proposed solutions or actions  
   Dates and timelines  
   Summary of previous behavior or situation  
   Summary of new behavior or situation  
   Decisions made and why the decisions were made  
   Other key points
4. Define a call to action.  
   When learning how to write a memo, one of the most crucial steps is the task statement or call to action. Depending on the memo type, create an appropriate call to action for your recipients and invite them to:  
     
   Contact you with questions  
   Reach out to their manager with any concerns  
   Review attachments or visit a website  
   Complete an assigned task by a deadline [...] This date change has been made to align all aspects of our personnel budget within the first quarter of business. However, no additional changes have been made to the performance review process.

Department managers will distribute the standard performance review preparation materials and the performance review timeline during the first week of January. All personnel salary increases will be implemented by March 29, 2024.

Thank you for your continued commitment, and I wish you a rejuvenating holiday season. We look forward to celebrating your career achievements and learning about your goals for the upcoming year.

Sample general memo — notice of software breach

To: Finance department

From: Jeffrey Jensen, CEO

Date: October 4, 2023 [...] style

Grid-width-8

background

#F5F5F5

## Free memo template + 6 memo examples

If you find it challenging to know how to write a memo without an example, here is a general memo template, as well as 6 memo examples to get you started. Below, you can find a memo example within each type — from a business memo template to a specific event template. You can use the template as a guide and adjust as needed for varying projects.

### General Memo.

Screenshot of a general memo template.

Download template

Sample general memo — change to performance review date

To: All Team Members

From: Jeffrey Jensen, CEO

Date: December 15, 2023

Subject: Changes to 2024 performance review date

Effective January 1, 2024, performance reviews will be conducted in February instead of March.

results.title: Memo | A data platform for the new era of PR measurement
results.content:
Make reporters happy with stories that drive traffic
 Build media lists with up-to-date readership trends
 Find reporters attracting readers for the narratives you care about most

Learn more

> “We need more platforms like Memo that have real metrics, straight from publications—tools that help give a more holistic view of the PR landscape.”
>
> Jenna Clark, Head of Measurement & Insights, Google Communications

## Book a demo today to see what Memo can do for you

Contact Us

Loading Comments... [...] Skip to content

Memo Logo

# Home

# Article readership data for modern Comms teams

 Get article traffic numbers on your press, direct from publications
 See the stories, outlets, and reporters shaping your company’s narrative
 Take the guesswork out of media relations
 Identify brand threats and stop flying blind in a crisis

## Fortune 500 leaders measure with Memo

## Executives value PR & Comms, but they don’t accept bad data

Impressions are a vanity metric, social signals have collapsed, and counting mentions won’t cut through the noise.

Show the true impact of PR & Comms with article readership data, run more strategic communications programs, and make data-backed decisions in a crisis.

## When you know how many people are reading your press, you can: [...] ### Measure the real impact of your efforts

Uncover how many people are actually reading about your brand and finally get earned media the credit it deserves.

### Create media strategies backed by data

Understand what stories, publications, reporters, and topics attract traffic to increase your impact.

### Make smarter, data-driven decisions in a crisis

Get clear visibility into which topics and news cycles are harming your brand and which are just ‘a flash in the pan.’

## Meet Reporter Intelligence

Finally, a reporter database that’s more than a rolodex. We built the world’s only reporter database powered by readership.
